query: Oosik Classic cross country ski race Talkeetna

videos.title: The Oosik Classic - Alaska's wildest ski race
videos.description:
My experience at Alaska's wildest ski race. A fairytale ski around the tiny outpost of Talkeetna, Ak.

FYI, according to Urban Dictionary:
Oosik-
1.) Penis bone commonly found in walruses and related species
2.) A petrified walrus penis
3.) An Alaskan swear word meaning dick

videos.title: Oosik March 2010
videos.description: Megan Holland, Jeff Benzak and Betsy Lund venture to Talkeetna, AK, for their annual cross-country ski race. They were asked to take a shortcut on the already short course. Afterwards they visited many of the local watering holes and joked later that they left their brains in Talkeetna -- what seemed like a good opening line for a honky tonk country song. The proceeding days were hazy and relatively unproductive.

videos.title: Skiing Centaurs?! Witness the Epic Oosik Classic Ski Race and How We Made Them!
videos.description:
Believe it or not, we centaur - skied 25 EPIC kms (16mi) through the mythical fairy forest that is the Oosik Classic Ski Race.
@seekingsnow 
@oosikclassic

Centaur Frame Dimensions:

2 - 33" 1x3/4 (torso)
1- v-shaped 2x4 (pelvis)
1- 16" 1x3/4 (hip)
2- 38" 1x3/4in (legs)

Scotch Mount - Double sided mounting tape - Clear - 15lbs, 1in roll: 

https://www.scotchbrand.com/3M/en_US/scotch-brand/products/catalog/~/Scotch-Mount-Clear-Double-Sided-Mounting-Tape/?N=4335+3289430110+3294529207&rt=rud

For more Oosik fun checkout my Oosik video from last year:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xti6mOIi10E&t=31s

Good Luck on your next Ski Quest

Intro 00:00
Frame Build 00:50
Mounting Hoof Plates 01:45
Shaping the body 02:26
Sewing it together 02:55
videos.transcript:
dark
so how are you feeling are you nervous
do you think our costumes are going to
hold up
last week Sarah and I skied the USIC
classic ski race in talkino Alaska it's
a wild wacky and wonderful Alaskan party
on skis most people dress up in costumes
of some kind and this year we decided to
go big skiing as a centaur was some of
the most fun I've had on skis so today I
want to show you how we made them
the costume was made in three main
phases
first phase was building the frame and
mounting the plates
the second was shaping the Centaur body
and the third and final phase was sewing
on the fabric
all right let's start with the frame
build first off I made a frame to fit
the hip belts of our backpacking packs
and we used two 33 inch long one by
three quarter inch posts for the main
body and these screwed into a v-shaped
2x4 at the back of the frame
the hips were formed by a single 16 inch
one by three and quarter inch piece
screwed into the back of the frame
the legs were made from two 38 inch long
one by three quarter inch members
although I would add a few extra inches
in length if I were to do it over again
I attached them with denim jean material
stapled to each side and this enabled
the Centaur to have the large range of
motion needed to go skiing
then I drilled a hole near the base of
the Hooves to thread a binding rope
through
to attach the Centaur frame to the skis
I made plates to fit the back end of our
skis from quarter inch plywood and used
two-sided tape to weld them to the skis
before I put the plates on the skis I
stapled a piece of webbing on them
through which I was able to thread a six
millimeter cord to attach the legs
if I were to make this again I would
just have drilled a hole and a thicker
piece of wood and tape that to the ski
it would have been a lot simpler and
sturdier as well
now that the frame and bindings were
finished we then started making
structure that shapes the body
this was pretty easy we got a bunch of
discarded catalogs at the post office
and used the paper to stuff trash bags
in order to form the body parts
I attached them to the frame with
Gorilla tape and that worked really well
for the legs we use plastic wrap to help
hold the shape in place and that was
pretty much it
and then finally it was time to sew up
the Centaur with some fabric we picked
up from the thrift store
after that we added a few finishing
touches and voila it was good so check
the description for the dimensions we
used and I hope this inspires your next
costume design and I'll go create some
art
[Music]
foreign

videos.title: Petrified Penis Bone = Oosik Classic 2011
videos.description:
Saturday, March 19, 2011  Oosik Classic Ski Race/Tour in Talkeetna, Alaska (www.anchoragenordicski.com for more info on the Oosik Classic). Oosik is the native word for the bone that is found in a walrus's penis.
An end of the Ski Season race and tour through the lakes, rivers and woods in Talkeetna followed by a "participant only" party with dinner and live entertainment, cash prizes for the top finishers, door prizes and free Root Beer and Beer provided by the Denali Brewing Co..
video by Cheryl Baxter for www.travelguidebook.com
